name: qpack-generator
description: Scans SoY data state, generates adaptive QPack question bundles for the GUI layer.
standalone_features: Data state scanning and module detection
Template-based QPack generation with adaptive filtering
Context query validation against computed views

features: CRM QPack: contact health, priorities, cold relationships
Projects QPack: overdue tasks, project health, next actions
Email QPack: response queue, contact threads
Calendar QPack: today's schedule, meeting prep
